zh.Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough於1377年7月25日出生在英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯時，他的父親Sir William Fitz William37歲，母親Lady Maud Cromwell22歲。他於大約1394年與Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1417年7月5日在他的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough于1377年7月25日出生在英国越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯时，他的父亲Sir William Fitz William37岁，母亲Lady Maud Cromwell22岁。他于大约1394年与Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1417年7月5日在他的家乡享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough was born on 25 July 1377, in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William Fitz William, was 37 and his mother, Lady Maud Cromwell, was 22. He married Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster about 1394. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 5 July 1417, in his hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough est né le 25 juillet 1377, à Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Fitz William, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud Cromwell, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster environ 1394. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 5 juillet 1417, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough am 25. Juli 1377 in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Fitz William 37 und seine Mutter Lady Maud Cromwell 22. Er hat um 1394 Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Juli 1417 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough è nato il il 25 luglio 1377 nel Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Fitz William, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Lady Maud Cromwell, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster circa 1394. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 5 luglio 1417, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbroughが1377年7月25日にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウ アンド クウスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir William Fitz Williamは37歳，母Lady Maud Cromwellは22歳であった。約1394年にLady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1417年7月5日に故郷で39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough(이)가 1377년 7월 25일 영국 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Fitz William(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maud Cromwell(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1394년 Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1417년 7월 5일 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.25 July 1377–5 July 1417: 25 de julho de 1377–5 de julho de 1417
pt.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough nasceu em 25 de julho de 1377, em Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Fitz William, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Maud Cromwell, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster aproximadamente 1394. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de julho de 1417, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough родился 25 июля 1377 г. в местности спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Fitz William было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud Cromwell, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster около 1394 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 5 июля 1417 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough nació el 25 de julio de 1377, en Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Fitz William, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Maud Cromwell, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster aproximadamente 1394. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 5 de julio de 1417, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
